zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Wilford於大約1489年出生在英國時，他的父親James Wilford36歲，母親Elizabeth Bettenham26歲。他於1514年之前與Elizabeth Culpeper在英國結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1553年9月20日之前在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Wilford于大约1489年出生在英国时，他的父亲James Wilford36岁，母亲Elizabeth Bettenham26岁。他于1514年之前与Elizabeth Culpeper在英国结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1553年9月20日之前在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Wilford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Nottinghamshire): habitational name from either of two places called Wilford, in Nottinghamshire and Suffolk, both probably named with an Old English wilig ‘willow tree’ + Old English ford ‘ford’.

variants.name: Wilfert
meanings: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements wolf ‘wolf’ + hart ‘hardy, brave’, ‘strong’.
from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements willio ‘will, wish’ + fridu ‘peace’.

variants.name: Willford
meanings: English (East Yorkshire, Lincolnshire, Rutland, and Northamptonshire): variant of   Wilford  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Wilford was born about 1489, in England, his father, James Wilford, was 36 and his mother, Elizabeth Bettenham, was 26. He married Elizabeth Culpeper before 1514, in England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 8 daughters. He died before 20 September 1553, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Wilford est né environ 1489, à Angleterre, son père, James Wilford, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Bettenham, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Culpeper avant 1514, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé avant 20 septembre 1553, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Wilford um 1489 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater James Wilford 36 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Bettenham 26. Er hat vor 1514 in England Elizabeth Culpeper geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb vor 20. September 1553 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Wilford è nato il circa 1489 nel England, il suo padre, James Wilford, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Bettenham, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Culpeper prima del 1514, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 8 figlie. Morì prima del 20 settembre 1553, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Wilfordが約1489年にイギリスで生まれた時，父James Wilfordは36歳，母Elizabeth Bettenhamは26歳であった。1514年以前にイギリスでElizabeth Culpeperと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1553年9月20日以前に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Wilford(이)가 대략 1489년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James Wilford(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Bettenham(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1514년 이전 영국에서 Elizabeth Culpeper(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1553년 9월 20일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Wilford родился около 1489 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени James Wilford было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Bettenham, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Culpeper перед 1514 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Он умер перед 20 сентябрь 1553 г. в его родном городе.
